hero.title: Ready to start your global journey?
hero.description: Fill out the form below and our experts will get back to you within 24 hours with a personalized solution.

introSection.title: Why get in touch with Jackson & Frank
paragraphs: Whether you're exploring Employer of Record (EOR) services, need global payroll and compliance support, or want to discuss contractor management and immigration, our team is here to help. We work with companies of all sizes to hire and pay talent in 160+ countries without setting up local entities.

When you contact us, you'll speak with experts who understand local labor laws, tax requirements, and employment practices in your target markets. We provide tailored proposals, clear timelines, and transparent pricing so you can make informed decisions about your global expansion.

Use the form below to tell us your needs, or call and email directly. We aim to respond within 24 hours with next steps and, where relevant, a custom quote. For existing clients, your account manager remains your main point of contact.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Get a personalized consultation tailored to your global expansion needs.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our services

items.question: How quickly can you set up EOR services?
items.answer: We can typically set up EOR services within 48-72 hours for most countries, depending on local requirements and documentation.

items.question: Which countries do you support?
items.answer: We support 160+ countries across Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Americas. Contact us for specific country availability.

items.question: What are your pricing models?
items.answer: Our pricing is transparent and competitive, based on the services you need and the countries where you operate. We offer custom quotes for all clients.

items.question: Do you handle compliance and legal requirements?
items.answer: Yes, we handle all local compliance, legal requirements, tax obligations, and regulatory matters in each country we operate in.

items.question: What is your typical response time for enquiries?
items.answer: We aim to respond to all enquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, you can call our office directly during business hours for faster assistance.

items.question: Can I get a custom quote for my expansion?
items.answer: Yes. Share your target countries, headcount, and timeline via the contact form or by email. Our team will provide a tailored proposal and cost breakdown, usually within 24–48 hours.

items.question: Do you offer demos or consultations?
items.answer: Yes. We offer free consultations to discuss your global hiring needs. Book a call or submit the contact form and we'll arrange a time that works for you.

items.question: What if I need support in a language other than English?
items.answer: We have local teams in 15+ countries and can support multiple languages. Indicate your preferred language in your message and we'll connect you with the right team.
